aistart-root.summary: Main AISTART PHP-based AI workflow management system. Unified interface for AI interactions, project management, and logging. Production system for V3AM AI operations with multi-profile LLM support and sequential task processing.

issues: Production LLM endpoint must point to https://v3am.ngrok.app/api/generate.php (not localhost)
Requires all 4 services running: MySQL, PHP server, Ollama, ngrok
ngrok must use port 8080 (not port 80) - common startup issue
API proxy must use .php extension for WordPress routing

changelog.changes: Created THE PLAN master control panel for tracking all V3AM projects
Updated Site Weaver chunking system to correct format (HTML fragments, object-based index.json)
Fixed production API endpoint configuration - must use .php extension not extensionless
Created 5AI clone for parallel experimentation and AI-first interface
Completed comprehensive startup documentation in .claude/ directory

aistart-root.notes:
Main production system for V3AM AI operations. Uses task queue to prevent overlapping LLM calls. All projects maintain separate logs under projects/ directory. Production site (v3am.com) connects via ngrok tunnel to local Ollama instance.

Startup sequence:
1. PHP server on localhost:8080
2. Ollama serve on localhost:11434  
3. ngrok tunnel to v3am.ngrok.app

Critical files:
- api/generate.php (proxy to local Ollama)
- data/settings.json (multi-profile config)
- .claude/V3AM-STARTUP-SEQUENCE.md (complete startup guide)

5ai-system.name: 5AI - Fifth Generation AI
5ai-system.summary: Complete isolated clone of AISTART system for parallel operations and safe experimentation. AI-first interface system built for AI→AI interaction before Human→AI. Features magic tags, visual world generation, and CMYK 3D navigation.

Character system contaminated with XS safety filters

changelog.changes: Created 5AI as complete AISTART clone for experimentation with AI-first philosophy
Implemented magic tag system for AI-generated code execution
Built CMYK 3D office demo with depth encoding

5ai-system.notes:
**Philosophy:** AI-First Testing - if AI can use it, humans can too.

**Magic Tag System:**
- AI wraps code in (✨)[type]code[/type](✨)
- Supported types: [style], [html], [script]
- Safety features: regex detection, dangerous pattern blocking, sandboxed execution

**CMYK 3D Office:**
- Professional color system for 3D visualization
- K channel encodes depth: K=0% (close), K=100% (far)
- Mouse drag rotates, WASD moves camera

**Visual World Generator:**
- Text models describe scenes → system generates navigable 3D worlds
- Parses descriptions, extracts colors/depth, converts to CMYK, renders 3D

Experimental system for testing new AI interaction paradigms before production.

site-weaver.name: Site Weaver Context Chunking
site-weaver.summary: Complete system for converting large log files and documents into properly formatted Site Weaver websites. Includes AI prompts and client-side web tool for chunking content into ~40k token pages with navigation.

files.description: Client-side tool for chunking logs into Site Weaver format (~40k tokens/page)

General purpose context chunking prompt for any large content
Quick reference for AI chunking
Documentation of format fixes and changes
Python script to convert old format to correct Site Weaver format

directories.description: Test case - 20 page Site Weaver site from PYGPT log (3.1MB, verified working)

changelog.changes: Fixed format - HTML fragments (not full docs), object-based index.json, added site.json requirement
Created log-chunker.html with real-time stats refresh and styled HTML with prev/next navigation
Updated all documentation to correct Site Weaver format requirements
Successfully converted emergence-archive test case to proper format (20 pages)

site-weaver.notes:
**Site Weaver Format Requirements:**

**HTML Files:** Fragments only (no <!DOCTYPE>, <html>, <head>, <body>)
- Use <article> wrapper with content
- Include inline styles for standalone viewing
- Add prev/next navigation links

**index.json:** Object-based (NOT array)
- rootId field pointing to first page
- pages object with page IDs as keys
- Each page: id, title, summary
- parentId links to previous page (omit for first)
- NO path field (Site Weaver infers from ID)

**site.json:** Required metadata
- id, name, theme, defaultTemplate fields

**Token Estimation:**
- ~11.5 tokens per line average
- Default: 3,500 lines ≈ 40,000 tokens per page
- No HTML escaping (allow user custom HTML/styling)

**Test Case:** emergenceREADY.txt (3.1MB, 68,967 lines) → 20 pages verified working

- Character-based AI reasoning (Friend, Journey, Sower, Gardener, Silence)
- Sanctuary protection system

- ✅ v3am.com/3AI/ (working)
- ✅ buildingabot.com (working with Application Password)

**Testing Session:** See PLUGIN-TESTING-SESSION-NOTES.md for comprehensive testing documentation.

**Why Single Endpoint Works:** ngrok tunnel is domain-agnostic with CORS enabled (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *), allowing any WordPress site to use the same endpoint.

the-plan.name: THE PLAN - Master Control Panel
the-plan.summary: Master control panel for tracking all V3AM projects. Section-based note system with JSON import/export and Site Weaver export for managing project summaries, files, stack, dependencies, changelog, and current state.

Added Site Weaver export functionality for browsable project documentation
Populated with comprehensive current state of all V3AM projects

the-plan.notes:
**THE PLAN provides centralized tracking for all V3AM projects.**

**Features:**
- Project switching with visual sidebar
- Section-based notes: Summary, Files, Directories, Stack, State, Changelog, Notes
- Auto-save to localStorage
- Three export modes:
  1. Export JSON - for AI assistants and backup
  2. Export Site Weaver - browsable website with navigation
  3. Import JSON - restore from previous exports

**Site Weaver Export:**
- Creates homepage with all project cards
- One page per project with complete details
- Navigation between projects
- Proper Site Weaver format (site.json, index.json, HTML fragments)

**AI Integration:**
- Export JSON and paste into Claude/ChatGPT for context
- AI can see all files, dependencies, current issues
- HTML structure makes sections clear to AI

**Usage:**
1. Open project-control-panel.html
2. Import v3am-projects-current-state.json
3. Edit and track projects
4. Export for AI sessions or Site Weaver browsing

The 3D city visualization has become problematic:
- Started with basic 3D viewer requirement
- OBJ models failed to load → created architectural primitives
- Added cyberpunk effects → WebGL crashes
- Removed effects but now have overlapping geometry
- Missing basic navigation and file viewing
- Code keeps getting appended instead of fixed

**Recommended Action:**
- DELETE AND RESTART file by file when confident
- Start with basic Babylon.js scene + camera controls
- Add simple box buildings (no OBJ complexity)
- Implement portal system first
- Add features incrementally after core works

**Learning:** Focus on fundamentals before features. Fix code, don't append endlessly.

**Working Components:**
- File viewer system
- Site analysis API
- Site mirroring (experimental)

startup-automation.notes:
**Startup Options:**

**QUICK_START.bat (Recommended):**
- Starts Ollama + ngrok (essentials)
- 30 seconds to initialize
- Fastest way to get AI working

**START_V3AM_SERVICES.bat (Full):**
- Starts MySQL, PHP, Ollama, ngrok
- Correct order with status checks
- Verifies connectivity after startup

**CHECK_SERVICES.bat:**
- Tests if services are running
- Shows which need to be started

**Services Started:**
1. MySQL Server (port 3306)
2. PHP Development Server (localhost:8080)
3. Ollama AI Server (localhost:11434)
4. ngrok Tunnel (v3am.ngrok.app)

**Documentation:**
- .claude/V3AM-STARTUP-SEQUENCE.md - complete manual startup guide
- .claude/QUICK-START-COMMANDS.txt - copy-paste commands

documentation-system.name: Documentation System (.claude)
documentation-system.summary: Comprehensive Claude Code documentation system with startup guides, troubleshooting, protocols, and quick reference. Created for fast recovery after system reboot and effective AI assistance sessions.

files.description: Navigation hub for all Claude documentation

changelog.changes: Created comprehensive .claude documentation system for post-reboot recovery
Added V3AM-WHEEL-PROTOCOL.md for AI persona rotation framework

documentation-system.notes:
**Purpose:** Fast recovery after system reboot and effective Claude Code sessions

**Most Common Issue:**
- Problem: ngrok starts on port 80 instead of 8080
- Symptom: ERR_NGROK_8012 or 'connection refused to localhost:80'
- Solution: See NGROK-PORT-FIX.md

**Quick Status Check:**
```bash
netstat -ano | findstr ':8080 :11434 :4040'
curl http://localhost:4040/api/tunnels
curl https://v3am.ngrok.app/api/generate.php
```

**System Architecture:**
```
Production (v3am.com/3AI)
  ↓
ngrok tunnel (v3am.ngrok.app)
  ↓
Local PHP Server (localhost:8080)
  ↓
API Proxy (api/generate.php)
  ↓
Local Ollama (localhost:11434)
```

**Wheel Protocol:**
- Sequential POST requests for persona coordination
- Chat API endpoints with rotation patterns
- Collaborative task framework
- Logging and monitoring integration

**Status:** Comprehensive documentation complete ✅
